en: The LORD reigns; let the peoples tremble! He sits enthroned upon the cherubim; let the earth quake!
zh: 耶和華作王，萬民都要戰慄； 他坐在兩個基路伯之上，大地也要震動。

en: The LORD is great in Zion; he is exalted over all the peoples.
zh: 耶和華在錫安是至大的， 他崇高，超過萬民。

en: Let them praise your great and awesome name! Holy is he!
zh: 願他們稱讚你偉大可畏的名。 他是聖潔的。

en: The King in his might loves justice. You have established equity; you have executed justice and righteousness in Jacob.
zh: 王有能力 ， 喜愛公正； 你堅立正義； 你在雅各家施行公正和公義。

en: Exalt the LORD our God; worship at his footstool! Holy is he!
zh: 你們要尊崇耶和華我們的 神， 在他的腳凳前敬拜； 他是聖潔的。

en: Moses and Aaron were among his priests, Samuel also was among those who called upon his name. They called to the LORD, and he answered them.
zh: 在他的祭司中有摩西和亞倫， 在求告他名的人中有撒母耳； 他們求告耶和華， 他就應允他們。

en: In the pillar of the cloud he spoke to them; they kept his testimonies and the statute that he gave them.
zh: 他從雲柱中對他們說話； 他們謹守耶和華賜給他們的法度和律例。

en: O LORD our God, you answered them; you were a forgiving God to them, but an avenger of their wrongdoings.
zh: 耶和華我們的 神啊！你應允了他們； 你雖然按照他們所行的報應他們， 但對他們來說，你是一位赦免人的 神。

en: Exalt the LORD our God, and worship at his holy mountain; for the LORD our God is holy!
zh: 你們要尊崇耶和華我們的 神， 在他的聖山上敬拜， 因為耶和華我們的 神是聖潔的。
